# Giulio Pinotti — Creative Director

> Portfolio of Giulio Pinotti, Creative Director based in São Paulo, Brazil. Selected work in branding, content, advertising, and design.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Selected work overview.
- [About](/about): Career, brands, and awards.

## Projects

- [Architecting a Global #1 Content Ecosystem](/projects/mary-kay-global-ecosystem): Mary Kay Brazil — full-funnel content machine that propelled the brand to the #1 TikTok account globally.
- [Pink News](/projects/pink-news): Mary Kay — a bold newspaper ad turned viral digital campaign.
- [Connecting Clients](/projects/connecting-clients): Next IP — branding and art direction.
- [Mary Kay Content Machine](/projects/mary-kay-content-machine): Decentralized creator ecosystem for Mary Kay Brazil.
- [Mastercard Priceless Ecosystem](/projects/mastercard-priceless-ecosystem): Global creative platform work for Mastercard.
- [Alternative Investments](/projects/alternative-investments): Branding and content for an investments platform.
- [Fini Algorithmic Diagnostics](/projects/fini-algorithmic-diagnostics): Algorithmic content diagnostics for Fini.
- [Give Yourself This Chance](/projects/give-yourself-this-chance): Campaign work.
- [The Reconquest](/projects/the-reconquest): Brand campaign.
